experiences.title: 6 December 2023 - spice seizure
experiences.text: smoked from bong for the first time but way overdid it and i had a grand mal seizure. believed i got spiced and ordered test kits. it was spice.

timedNotes.note: texted barb as it started to pass
time is estimate. had a grand mal seizure from unknowingly smoking synthetic cannabinoids

ingestions.notes: a single long line taken over a long time
started w a bump n small line (i was scared) then did many lines. made me so calm and normal. i think i have adhd
way easier to take than last time. slowly redosed more than i should have to be on other people's level. don't do that again
time is est. used speed to have "normal thoughts" to calm my crushing anxiety. i think it worked

timedNotes.note: time is est. rubbed the skin on my body a bit much because it felt warm and cozy and felt a sudden wave of overwhelming nausea, guilt and embarrassment. i felt like i did something horrible to someone else and forgot, asking if i had done something wrong. then had a flashback to childhood traumas and the body feeling of something being forced into my body and turning me inside out. i desperately asked for help from harley but had an extremely hard time with language, i think i deadnamed them while trying to figure out how to form sentences. they helped me breathe then they took me downstairs to calm down and everyone had their own breakdown and we had to wait out the trip. then we took speed and/or ket to calm ourselves down while we regained brain function

for most of the trip i had the most pleasurable and warm and lovey feeling since mdma. CEVs like falling into a ravine with eyes on the walls which faces manifested from & later a field of waves with eyes travelling across them. if only i didn't have the nervous nauseous waves
